---
name: Research idea / Feature proposal
about: Suggest new capabilities, evaluation methods, or knowledge base expansions
title: '[RESEARCH] '
labels: research
assignees: ''
---

**What are you proposing?**
Clear description of the idea.

**Why does this matter for AEON's mission?**
How does this improve trustworthy decision-making under Mars conditions?

**Proposed approach (if known)**
- Technical direction
- New files or changes required
- Evaluation method

**Relevant references or data sources**
Links to papers, NASA docs, real engineering data, etc.

**Willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I can work on this
- [ ] I can help review / provide domain expertise
- [ ] Just an idea for the maintainers

---

*We prioritize depth and auditability over breadth. Ideas that increase the trustworthiness of the system will receive the most attention.*
